title: [ExportVerilog] Vivado error in SV code generated from FSMs when disallowMuxInlining=true

features.name: FSM state enum typedef
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef used to represent FSM states

features.name: enum-typed wire with ternary assignment
features.description: Code should include a wire declared with an enum type and assigned via a ternary expression with separate declarations when disallowMuxInlining is true

features.name: FSM state constant wire assignments
features.description: Code should include wires assigned to FSM state enum constants used as ternary branch operands
